name: Juro Contract Management API
what_it_does: Juro REST API for AI-native contract management and automation platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage contracts from templates, retrieve contract data and metadata, track contract status through approval and signature workflows, trigger contract creation from CRM or HR events, search contract repositories, manage counterparties, and integrate contract data with business systems.
use_cases: Triggering contract creation from CRM deal stages from sales automation agents
Retrieving contract status and metadata from legal operations agents
Managing contract approval workflows from legal process automation agents
Searching and analyzing contract portfolios from contract intelligence agents
not_for: Complex multi-party enterprise contract negotiation without lawyer involvement
Simple document signing without contract lifecycle management requirements
Compliance-heavy industries without self-service contract automation focus
best_when: A high-growth tech company or scale-up wants AI agents to automate contract creation from templates, trigger contracts from CRM/HRIS events, and manage signature workflows without manual legal intervention for routine agreements.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract terms create legal and financial obligations. AI-generated contract variations must be reviewed by legal counsel before execution for non-standard agreements.

auth.notes: Juro supports API key and OAuth 2.0. API keys available for server-to-server integrations. OAuth for user-level integrations. Scopes control access to contract read/write and template management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for small teams; API access on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Team, Business, and Enterprise tiers based on contract volume and users
pricing.notes: UK-based (London) company. AI-native CLM platform growing in legal tech. Strong focus on self-service contracts for sales, HR, and procurement teams. Competing with Ironclad and DocuSign CLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Contract terms create legal and financial obligations — legal review required for non-standard agreements
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
UK/EU company — GDPR compliance; EU data residency default
Contract template variables must match exactly — field mismatch causes creation failures
E-signature workflow requires counterparty email address — validate before triggering
API access restricted to paid plans
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contract legal and financial data. GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. EU/US data residency. UK-based legal tech.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contract legal and business data. GDPR, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. EU/US data residency.
